viewer.description: Read routes, plans, and generated public artifacts.

contributor.description: Create local traces and staged proposals without mutating production registries.

operator.description: Run local/self-hosted workflows and connector reads under policy.

maintainer.description: Promote validated public content and build host bundles.

deny.reason: Feedback promotion is staging-only and never mutates production directly.
Secrets must be referenced by environment variable names only.
